publishedAbstract: - noobaa-core pod is in CLBO state with error: ~~~ 2h52m Warning FailedMount pod/noobaa-core-0 MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "noobaa-ca-inject": configmap references non-existent config key: ca-bundle.crt ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF: Pod noobaa-core is in CLBO state after installation, why?
